message:
feat(fcp3): add re-exports for blur modules to semantic owner crates br-0aczd.2

Extend fcp-kernel, fcp-policy, and fcp-evidence with re-exports covering
the remaining ownership-blur modules from fcp-core:

fcp-policy:
  - enforcement (EnforcementCheckOrder, CheckOutcome, etc.)
  - posture (PostureAttestation, PostureRequirements, etc.)
  - enrollment (DeviceId, DeviceEnrollmentRequest, KeyType, etc.)
  - pcs (PcsGroupState, PcsMode, etc. via `pub use fcp_core::pcs`)

fcp-evidence:
  - object (ObjectId, ObjectHeader, RetentionClass, StoredObject, etc.)

fcp-kernel:
  - connector_artifacts (ConnectorTarget, ConnectorManifestObject, etc.)
  - release (ReleaseManifest, ReleaseSignature, RollbackRules, etc.)
  - credential (CredentialId, CredentialBackend, CredentialObject, etc.)
  - secret (SecretId, SecretObject, SecretRotationPolicy, etc.)

Also annotate fcp-core/src/lib.rs module declarations with ownership
categories (shared primitive, fcp-kernel, fcp-policy, fcp-evidence) to
make the migration status visible in the source.

50 tests pass across all three owner crates (32 + 11 + 7).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
